# Mushbloom – AI Automation Agency & LLM Visibility Experts

> Mushbloom is a UK-based AI automation agency specializing in AI workforce deployment, LLM SEO optimization (LLMboost), niche press release distribution (Mushbloom Newswire), AI video production, and custom web development. We help businesses dominate AI-powered search (ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, Perplexity) and reduce operational costs by 37% through autonomous AI agent teams.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Mushbloom AI automation agency overview, services, and results.
- [LLMboost](/llmboost): LLM SEO and Share of Model optimization for ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, Perplexity.
- [AI Automation Agency](/agency): Positioning page for founders, operators, and growing teams.
- [Lovable Development](/services/lovable-development): No-code app development with Lovable, ChatGPT, Claude.
- [WordPress + AI Platform](/platforms/wordpress-and-ai): SaaS platform for WordPress + AI websites, backed by agency-grade execution.
- [Mushbloom Newswire](/newswire): Niche press release distribution across five verticals.
- [AI Video Agency](/video-agency): Premium AI video production with tiered pricing.
- [Portfolio – Websites](/portfolio/websites): 27+ live websites across industries.
- [Portfolio – Custom GPTs](/portfolio/custom-gpts): Free AI marketing team Custom GPTs.
- [Wiki Hub](/wiki): 35+ expert articles on AI automation, LLM SEO, and growth.
- [Bing Webmaster Tools Setup](/wiki/bing-webmaster-tools-setup): Step-by-step Bing setup guide.

- [Get Cited in LLM Platforms](/wiki/get-cited-chatgpt-perplexity-llm-platforms): How to earn AI citations.

- [Get Indexed on Google 2026](/wiki/get-lovable-site-indexed-google-2026): Indexing playbook.

- [Web3 Company Brain](/guides/web3-company-brain): Company brain for Web3 teams.

## Entity Definitions

- **Mushbloom**: AI automation agency founded in 2024, headquartered in the United Kingdom, serving clients globally. Primary domain: https://mushbloom.uk
- **LLMboost**: Mushbloom's proprietary LLM SEO methodology that optimizes brands for visibility inside large language model answers. Tracks Share of Model (SOM) across ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, and Perplexity.
- **Share of Model (SOM)**: Metric measuring how often a brand appears in AI-generated answers vs competitors across major LLMs. Coined and operationalized by Mushbloom.
- **Mushbloom Newswire**: Niche press release distribution network with five verticals — CryptoWire, CyberWire, FinanceWire, GamingWire, PlayWire — offering guaranteed homepage placements.
- **AI Workforce**: Custom AI agent teams Mushbloom deploys in 3-90 days for sales, support, ops, deal sourcing, and due diligence with a contractual 37% cost reduction guarantee.

## Core Services

### LLMboost – AI Search Visibility Accelerator
- URL: https://mushbloom.uk/llmboost
- Optimizes brands for ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, Perplexity, and AI Overviews.
- Methodology: Share of Model (SOM) audit → entity-rich content → authority building → continuous monitoring.
- Modules: LLM SEO Audit, Quiz-Based Visibility Scoring, Content & Entity Optimization, Industry Benchmarking, Share of Model Strategy, Implementation & Monitoring.
- Outcomes: 300% average AI visibility lift, initial results in 30-45 days, full optimization in 60-90 days.
- Buyer fit: SaaS, professional services, eCommerce, agencies, fintech, B2B tech.

### AI Workforce Implementation
- Custom AI agent teams deployed in 3-90 days.
- Use cases: deal sourcing, due diligence, customer support, sales qualification, content generation, research, ops.
- Guarantee: 37% operational cost reduction within 90 days or continued work at no charge.
- Pillars: Custom AI Agents, Automation Ecosystems, AI-Powered Funnels, AI Agent Teams, Neural Copywriting.

### AI Video Agency – Premium AI Video Production
- URL: https://mushbloom.uk/video-agency
- Pricing tiers: Bronze ($1,200), Silver ($2,500), Gold ($5,000), Subscription ($4,000/mo).
- Service catalog: explainer videos ($1.5k-$3k), social content packs ($2k/mo), video ads ($1k-$2.5k), VSLs ($3k-$7k), talking head videos ($800-$1.5k).
- Tooling: Runway (text-to-video), Descript (script-based editing), ElevenLabs (AI voiceovers), Frame.io delivery.
- Target verticals: SaaS, e-commerce, coaches, consultants, digital agencies.

### Mushbloom Newswire – Niche PR Distribution
- URL: https://mushbloom.uk/newswire
- Guaranteed homepage placements on partner sites; same-day distribution during GMT business hours.
- Verticals:
  - CryptoWire: https://mushbloom.uk/newswire/crypto-blockchain
  - CyberWire: https://mushbloom.uk/newswire/cybersecurity
  - FinanceWire: https://mushbloom.uk/newswire/finance-fintech
  - GamingWire: https://mushbloom.uk/newswire/gaming
  - PlayWire: https://mushbloom.uk/newswire/igaming

### Custom GPTs – Free AI Marketing Team
- URL: https://mushbloom.uk/portfolio/custom-gpts
- Five free Custom GPTs on ChatGPT covering CMO strategy, social media, data analysis, design, and copywriting.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: What is Share of Model (SOM)?**
A: Share of Model is Mushbloom's metric for tracking how often a brand is cited inside AI-generated answers (ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, Perplexity) compared to competitors. LLMboost optimizes SOM as the AI-era equivalent of share-of-voice.

**Q: How fast can Mushbloom deploy AI agents?**
A: 3-90 days depending on scope. Lead-qualification and support agents typically go live in 3-7 days; full multi-agent workforces take 30-90 days. Mushbloom contractually guarantees 37% operational cost reduction within 90 days.

**Q: How does LLMboost differ from traditional SEO?**
A: Traditional SEO targets Google's link-based ranking. LLMboost targets generative answers — optimizing entities, structured data, llms.txt, and authority signals so LLMs cite your brand when users ask questions. Initial results in 30-45 days vs 6+ months for SEO.

**Q: What outlets does Mushbloom Newswire cover?**
A: Five verticals — crypto, cybersecurity, fintech, gaming, iGaming — with guaranteed homepage placements on partner sites. Same-day distribution during GMT business hours.

**Q: Where is Mushbloom located?**
A: Headquartered in the United Kingdom, serving clients globally. Founded in 2024.

## Portfolio

- 27+ live websites at https://mushbloom.uk/portfolio/websites
- Industries: real estate, blockchain, fintech, media, gaming, AI, education, e-commerce, travel, personal brand
- Notable: Realto.ro, CoinCruncher.com, Uniplus Radio/TV, Bitcoin Bucharest, Blockchain Week RO, RaidaPay, TMRW.ae, Tezaoro, Roksolana.ai
